marketState: neutral-to-bearish, price modestly rich to fair value amid ample storage and a soft, low-reliability seasonal tilt
summary: Front NG trades $3.22, about $0.29 above the $2.93 model fair value, but still well inside the $2.43-$3.43 band rather than at an extreme. Seasonality carries a low-reliability but consistently soft tilt (only 31-38% odds of higher prices over 2-4 weeks, typical 4-week move -3.1%), and storage sits 175 Bcf above the 5-year average, reinforcing a comfortable supply backdrop. Managed money is net short (-64.8k contracts) but only at the 31st percentile of its 5-year range, so positioning is not crowded and there is room to add shorts rather than a signal the trade is exhausted. Near-term (1-7D/8-16D) weather demand fields are missing from this snapshot and technicals are mixed across timeframes (bearish trend and 50<200 EMA on daily/weekly, but neutral 1h/4h with a bullish EMA cross), so near-term conviction is low. The futures curve shows a normal winter contango hump (Dec/Jan near $3.9-4.4) with only a slight front/next backwardation, consistent with typical seasonal structure rather than any supply-squeeze signal.

longTerm.tp2: $2.65 (toward lower fair-value band / seasonal weak-month zone)
longTerm.sizing: 1R approx 1% account risk; take partial profit at TP1, trail remainder to TP2

longTerm.invalidation: A sustained close above the fair-value band top (~$3.43-3.50), a bullish storage surprise (larger draw/smaller build than expected), or weather demand pushing materially above the 5y range would invalidate this view.

shortTerm.rationale: The 1-7D and 8-16D weather demand fields are missing from this snapshot, fair-value projections for +7D/+14D/+21D are also null, and short-timeframe technicals disagree (5m/15m bearish trend, 1h/4h neutral with a bullish 50>200 EMA cross, RSI mid-range on all), leaving no clean edge for a 1-10 day trade.
shortTerm.trigger: Wait for the 1-7D/8-16D weather demand and forward fair-value fields to populate, and for technicals to align across timeframes (or price to test the fair-value band edges near $2.93/$3.43) before taking a near-term position.
